Location: Mount Madja-as (near  Culasi), Antique, Western Visayas
Remarks: I call this the ‘excited call’, which I only heard once or twice. It was with a group of 4-5 PSBs foraging and hopping around the canopy very close to me at the summit ridge (with short trees).

This is the ‘quiet call’, which I heard more often. It is the quiet squeaky ‘chip’ at ~4 kHz. This was with a lone or 2 PSBs quietly foraging with not so much movement (occasional hopping between branches in the sub-canopy). This one is tough to hear along the windy ridge, but quite reliable in the forest interior.
